name: orcaslicer-mcp
description: Drive OrcaSlicer with AI: load models, arrange the plate, tune settings, slice, and analyze the result.
long_description:
Connects Claude to a real, running OrcaSlicer (the OrcaSlicer MCP build, which adds a token-authenticated local control API). Load models, arrange the plate, tune and sanity-check settings, slice, and analyze the result, live, with every change visible in the GUI. The slicer stays authoritative and on your machine: no cloud calls, no telemetry, no accounts.

Requires: (1) the OrcaSlicer MCP build from https://github.com/maxellis/OrcaSlicer/releases with its Remote API enabled in Preferences, and (2) uv (https://docs.astral.sh/uv/), which supplies the uvx command this extension uses to run the server.

api_token.title: Remote API token
api_token.description: In OrcaSlicer (MCP build): Preferences -> Remote API -> Enable Remote API, then copy the token shown there.

api_url.title: OrcaSlicer address
api_url.description: Leave as-is unless you changed the port or run OrcaSlicer on another machine (with LAN access enabled there).
